query: what does ca_put(data, device, subaddress) command do?
raw_output_preview: The ca_put(data, device, subaddress) command writes the 24-bit value data to the addressed module register (F=16). The device argument is the I /O module index from the configuration file and can be 0

query: what does ca_put(data, device, subaddress) command do?
